channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Oyo Governor Seyi Makinde Declares 2027 Presidential Ambition, Forms PDP-APM Alliance
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, don officially declare say e wan run for Nigeria 2027 presidential election. The declaration happen on Thursday for big rally wey dem hold for Mapo Hall, Ibadan, wey ...

item.title: Pakistan Continues Diplomatic Efforts to Mediate Between US and Iran
item.description: Pakistan on Thursday reaffirmed its ongoing role in trying to reduce tensions between the United States and Iran. Foreign Office Spokesperson Tahir Andrabi said that Islamabad believes in diplomacy an...

item.title: Cybercriminals Exploit Stolen iPhones for Phishing and Unlocking Services
item.description: Researchers have uncovered a growing underground ecosystem that enables criminals to unlock stolen iPhones and target their owners through phishing attacks. The market includes software sellers on the...

item.title: Blood vs Duty Episode 29: Axl and Jovi Shot During Director Azuelo Interview
item.description: In the latest episode of the thrilling ABS-CBN series Blood vs Duty, high tension and unexpected violence took center stage. Axl and Jovi were dramatically shot while they were right in the middle of ...

item.title: FDA Chief Resigns Amid Trump Administration Turnover
item.description: The FDA has experienced a significant leadership change as its chief has resigned, marking the departure of the fourth high-profile official from the Trump administration. This development has raised ...

item.title: Lake Victoria Basin Commission to Hold First Lake Victoria Day in Mwanza to Promote Sustainable Management
item.description: The Lake Victoria Basin Commission (LVBC) has finalised all preparations for the inaugural Lake Victoria Day celebrations set to take place from May 18 to 21, 2026, at Nane Nane Grounds in Mwanza City...

item.title: King Charles visits Golders Green to support victims of antisemitic attacks
item.description: King Charles III visited Jewish Care in North London's Golders Green to show personal support for Britain's Jewish community following recent antisemitic attacks. During the unannounced visit, the Kin...

item.title: Serengeti Boys begin their U-17 Afcon finals journey
item.description: The Tanzanian U-17 national football team, popularly known as the Serengeti Boys, have officially started their campaign at the Africa U-17 Cup of Nations (Afcon) finals. The team is preparing to face...

item.title: Crikey readers voice opinions on the 2026 federal budget and economic fairness
item.description: Crikey readers have weighed in on the 2026 federal budget, sharing strong views ranging from approval to outright frustration. The debate largely centres on economic reforms, such as changes to capita...

item.title: Examining the Risks of Constructing Homes on Flood-Prone Land
item.description: A recent study conducted by Aviva has revealed that approximately one in nine new homes in England are being constructed on land at risk of flooding. Alarmingly, many of these developments comply full...

item.title: Nicki Minaj Discusses Her Public Support for Donald Trump
item.description: In a recent interview with TIME, Nicki Minaj explained her decision to openly support Donald Trump, emphasizing that she no longer wants to conceal her political beliefs despite potential backlash fro...

item.title: Ukambani Voters Demand Tangible Commitments Ahead of 2027 Elections, Says NLP Leader
item.description: As the 2027 General Election approaches, political dynamics in Kenya's Ukambani region are shifting. Augustus Kyalo Muli, the leader of the National Liberal Party (NLP) and National Patron of the Anza...

item.title: Bright Eyes perform full sets of iconic albums for 21st anniversary at Red Rocks
item.description: Bright Eyes celebrated the 21st anniversary of their acclaimed albums ‘I’m Wide Awake, It’s Morning’ and ‘Digital Ash in a Digital Urn’ with a special performance at Red Rocks Amphitheatre in Colorado...

item.title: Everyday Things That Changed for the Worse as They Became Popular
item.description: Many everyday experiences and products have changed drastically as they gained popularity, often leaving longtime fans disappointed. Popular fast-food chains, once known for affordability and quality,...

item.title: Media Bias in Addressing Antisemitism Across Political Lines
item.description: George Monbiot argues that antisemitism should be confronted universally, yet the British media often allows the right-wing to escape scrutiny. At a recent anti-antisemitism rally in London, Zack Pola...

item.title: Instagram Ads Market Products Linked to Drug Use Under the Guise of Everyday Items
item.description: Instagram has become a surprising marketplace for products that subtly suggest drug use, particularly cocaine and other powders, despite Meta's strict policies against promoting illegal substances. Lu...

item.title: Toronto study identifies gene linked to autism-related behaviours
item.description: Researchers at Toronto’s Hospital for Sick Children have identified a gene called PTCHD1-AS that may contribute to behaviours commonly associated with autism spectrum disorder (ASD), including impaire...

item.title: HPV Vaccination in South Africa: Why Boys Should Be Included
item.description: In South Africa, girls aged nine to 14 receive free HPV vaccinations through a government-funded school programme, aimed at preventing cervical cancer. Boys, however, are largely excluded from this im...

item.title: Trump and Xi describe US-China talks as constructive during state dinner
item.description: During a state dinner in China, US President Donald Trump described his discussions with Chinese President Xi Jinping as 'extremely positive and productive.' The meetings, part of a high-stakes visit ...

item.title: Government Starts Feasibility Studies for Lake Tanganyika Water Supply Project
item.description: Dodoma — Tanzania government is pushing forward plans to expand water supply across the country. Feasibility studies and detailed designs have started for a major project to transport water from Lake ...
